title: Work once again becomes central theme of 2027 French presidential election
subhead: Candidates from the center to the right are advocating for the French to work more, while unions and the left struggle to put working conditions, meaning, and workplace democracy on the agenda.

New book reveals Macron couple was rocked by two presidential terms
subhead: Between a president plagued by doubt and a first lady asserting herself, journalist Florian Tardif paints a striking portrait of the couple.

title: Trump falls for China's bluff over arms sales to Taiwan
subhead: By suggesting that arms sales to Taipei could be used as a bargaining chip in US-China relations, the US president has crossed a foreign-policy red line that had stood for nearly 50 years.

title: In wartime Iran, the Asiatic cheetah – a critically endangered species – faces an uncertain fate
subhead: The cheetah, a national symbol with fewer than 25 left in the wild, is the focus of a conservation program now threatened by the conflict with the US and Israel.

title: Over 50 Michelin-starred chefs demand change: 'Competitiveness only delivers soulless volume, sustainable agriculture creates real wealth'
subhead: 51 Michelin-starred chefs urge an urgent shift toward a less intensive, less harmful agricultural model that prioritizes sustainable, family-run and high-quality production.

title: Captured, imprisoned and tortured: Russia 'ignores all laws and does whatever it wants' to Ukrainian civilians
subhead: Since the 2022 invasion, Moscow has been arresting citizens from the occupied territories en masse in an effort to crush all resistance. More than 16,000 people are currently imprisoned, according to the Ukrainian Parliament Commissioner for Human Rights.

title: Elon Musk attacks Christopher Nolan for casting Lupita Nyong'o as Helen of Troy
subhead: The billionaire accused the filmmaker of 'defiling Homer' by choosing a Black actress, claiming Nolan only did so to comply with diversity requirements and win an Oscar. The controversy echoes the Trump administration's opposition to affirmative action policies.
